# VERAQIS

> VERAQIS builds offline tools for inspecting damaged archives and recovering only
> data that can be verified. Processing is local — files are not uploaded. Uncertain
> or unsupported data is marked clearly and never presented as recovered.

This file is an auxiliary navigation aid for AI answer engines. It is not an indexing
standard and does not replace robots.txt, sitemap.xml, JSON-LD, or the HTML pages.

## Products

- [VERAQIS Archiver for Android](https://veraqis.tech/mobile.html): free, signed public beta. Scan an archive before extracting; list and extract safe entries into a folder you choose. No telemetry. This is the only publicly downloadable build today.
- [VERAQIS Recovery for Windows](https://veraqis.tech/desktop.html): damaged-ZIP analysis and verified recovery. Status: store release pending — there is no public Windows binary and no Microsoft Store URL yet. No unsigned .exe is published.
- [ColdPass](https://veraqis.tech/coldpass.html): archived experimental project. No active development and no download.

## Download and verification

- [Download](https://veraqis.tech/download.html): the signed Android APK plus its SHA-256 checksum.
- [Test record](https://veraqis.tech/testing.html): how a recovery is proven — published corpus, checksums, structural validity and methodology.
- [Reports](https://veraqis.tech/reports.html): example recovery reports.
- [Security architecture](https://veraqis.tech/security.html): threat model, read-only input, sandboxing.
- [Documentation](https://veraqis.tech/docs.html)
- [Pricing](https://veraqis.tech/pricing.html): Free Analyzer, and price hypotheses for Personal and Technician (not yet purchasable).

## Important limitations

- VERAQIS does not bypass passwords or decrypt encrypted content.
- Recovery depends on surviving, verifiable evidence; a supported format does not guarantee recoverability.
- Unknown or unsupported data stays unknown — it is never labelled "recovered".
- "Structurally safe to extract" means the archive layout is safe; file contents are not scanned for malware.
- The products are in beta; availability and prices are stated honestly and may change.
